name: Broccoli Pasta
recipeIngredient: 1 box garden rotini (includes spinach, carrot, beet, and plain pasta)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pan-broil the broccoli florets until they turn dark green and remain crisp.
2. Cook the rotini until al dente.
3. Mix in the cooked broccoli, salsa, chopped cilantro, and chopped red onion to enhance flavors.
